channel.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Automation

  • cuicstars12 - Clojure library providing a high-level API for UI test automation over the DevTools Protocol.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Protocol Driver Libraries

  • Kotlin: chrome-devtools-kotlinstars7 - A coroutine-based client library, providing low-level CDP primitives and high-level extensions.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Protocol Driver Libraries

  • Go: Rodstars1.5k
  • Java: jvppeteerstars214 - Headless Chrome For Java

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Automation

  • Playwrightstars23.8k - Node.js library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Automation

  • Taikostars2.8k - A Node.js module to automate the Chrome/Chromium using DevTools protocol.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Nov 18th - Nov 24th, 2019
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Developing with the protocol

  • BrowserGap Community Editionstars1.2k - A remote browser product, open sourced. Makes heavy use of the raw, tip-of-tree Chrome DevTools protocol.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
DevTools Extensions

Themes

  • Material UI Theme - Provides various Material Design inspired themes.

    • DevTools Extensions

    Performance

  • TracerBenchstars194 - TracerBench is a controlled performance benchmarking tool for web applications, providing clear, actionable and usable insights into performance deltas.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Sep 2nd - Sep 8th, 2019
item.description:
Learning

  • DevTools Snippetsstars1.7k - Collection of snippets.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Developing with the protocol

  • chrome-remote-interface Wiki - Many useful recipes.
  • Chrome Protocol Proxystars95 - Tool for debugging clients using devtools protocol.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Browser Adapters

  • IE Diagnostics Adapterstars581 - Protocol adaptor for Microsoft IE 11 to CDP.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    Node.js

  • chrome-devtools-frontend - Mirror of the frontend that ships in Chrome.
  • ndbstars10.4k - An improved Node.js debugging experience with the DevTools Frontend.
  • thetoolstars176 - CPU, memory, coverage, type profiling with Node.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Protocol Driver Libraries

  • TypeScript/Node.js: chrome-debugging-clientstars103
  • Java: chrome-devtools-java-clientstars129
  • Java: karate - Web-service testing framework with a Java API to automate Chrome
  • Python: PyCDPstars33 - Pure-Python, sans-IO wrappers. See also the Trio CDP driverstars29
  • Python: chromewhipstars97 - drop-in replacement for the splash service
  • Python: pychromestars476 - low level CDP transport handler
  • Python: ChromeControllerstars144 - high-level browser mgmt
  • Go: chromedpstars6.2k - High-level actions and tasks for driving browsers
  • Go: cdpstars542
  • Go: gcdstars173
  • Go: godetstars323
  • Ruby: Cupritestars778 - Capybara driver
  • Ruby: ChromeRemotestars107
  • Clojure: clj-chrome-devtoolsstars105 - The CDP wrapper API is autogenerated and will be updated when CDP protocol changes.

    • DevTools Extensions

    Performance

  • slothstars189 - Chrome extension allows to enable and save CPU and network throttling for selected tabs.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

  • ChromeDevTools/devtools-protocolstars624 - Canonical location of the protocol JSON. Issue tracker for protocol bugs. TypeScript types.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Automation

  • Also all Protocol Driver Libraries below

    • DevTools tooling and ecosystem

    Chrome Debugger integration with Editors

  • VS Code - Debugger for Chromestars2.1k - Breakpoint debugging in VS Code.
  • VS Code - Elements for Microsoft Edgestars341 - Elements panel inside VS Code.
  • ChromeREPLstars348 - Within Sublime Text, use the Chrome console.
  • Sublime Web Inspector - JavaScript Breakpoint debugging right in Sublime Text.
  • WebStorm/JetBrains Chrome Extension - The WebStorm IDE can debug JavaScript, view the DOM tree, and edit HTML, CSS and JS live.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    Android

  • j2v8-debuggerstars52 - Debugging JavaScript running in J2V8stars2k with Chrome DevTools.

    • DevTools tooling and ecosystem

    Network Inspection

  • Weer - A HTTP protocol debugger (closed source)

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
DevTools tooling and ecosystem

Network Inspection

  • betwixtstars4.3k - System level network proxy, providing inspection via Network panel.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

  • DevTools Protocol API Docs - Easy browsable UI for exploring the protocol's domains, methods and events.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Automation

  • Puppeteerstars70.5k - Node.js offering a high-level API to control headless Chrome over the DevTools Protocol.
    • Python port: pyppeteerstars1.5k
    • Rust port: Rust Headless Chromestars706
    • .NET port: Puppeteer Sharpstars1.9k
    • Ruby port: Ferrumstars1k
    • headless-devtoolsstars540 - Puppeteer plugin to get CSS Coverage or JS Heap snapshot.
    • PuPHPeteerstars1k - PHP-bridge to control Puppeteer using PHP.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Browser Adapters

  • Remote Debug Firefox adapterstars115 - Translates Firefox's devtools protocol to the CDP.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    Android

  • Facebook Stethostars12.2k - Native Android debugging with Chrome DevTools.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    ClojureScript

  • Diracstars739 - Debugging of ClojsureScript.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    Lua

  • Marestars243 - Lua debugging with Chrome DevTools.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    iOS

  • PonyDebuggerstars5.8k - Remote network and data debugging iOS apps with Chrome DevTools.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    Node.js

  • Debugging Node.js with Chrome DevTools - Guide on using the full debugging and profiling support in Node v6.3+.

    • DevTools Extensions

    Workflow

  • Augury - Debugging and Profiling for Angular 2 applications.

    • DevTools tooling and ecosystem

    CPU profile

  • Wishbone python framework - Profiling data can export as .cpuprofile.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Jul 9th - Jul 15th, 2018
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Developing with the protocol

  • DevTools Backendstars105 - Standalone implementation of the Chrome DevTools backend to debug arbitrary web environments.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Protocol Driver Libraries

  • PHP: chrome-devtools-protocolstars113 - A PHP client library for the protocol.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Aug 28th - Sep 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Protocol Driver Libraries

  • Kotlin: chrome-reactive-kotlinstars63 - reactive (rxjava 2.x), low-level client library in Kotlin

    • DevTools Extensions

    Workflow

  • Metal.js Developer Tools - Inspect the Metal component hierarchies.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Jul 3rd - Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Protocol Driver Libraries

  • C#/dotnet: chrome-dev-toolsstars57 - Protocol wrapper generator that can be customized by editing handlebars templates. Includes .Net Core template.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Developing with the protocol

  • ChromeDriver - The official Selenium/WebDriver implementation for Chrome is implemented on top of the DevTools Protocol.

    • DevTools tooling and ecosystem

    Object formatting

  • immutable-devtoolsstars634 - Custom formatter for Immutable-js values.

    • DevTools tooling and ecosystem

    CPU profile

  • call-tracestars24 - Can instrument your JS with hooks, and then generate a .cpuprofile of the of the complete (non-sampled) execution. View either time or call counts.
  • cpuprofilifystars151 - Converts output of various profiling/sampling tools to the .cpuprofile format.

    • DevTools tooling and ecosystem

    Multimedia

  • snaplinestars369 - Converts timeline screenshots to gif.

    • DevTools tooling and ecosystem

    Timeline, Tracing & Profiling

  • DevTools Timeline Viewer - Share URLs of your timeline recordings.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Protocol Driver Libraries

  • JavaScript/Node.js: chrome-remote-interfacestars3.4k - The most-used JavaScript API for the protocol

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools May 22nd - May 28th, 2017
item.description:
Chrome DevTools Protocol

Developing with the protocol

  • Remote Debug Gatewaystars81 - Allows you to connect a client to multiple browsers at once.
  • RemoteDebug - Initiative to normalize debugging protocols across today's browsers.

    • Using DevTools frontend with other platforms

    Go

  • go-debugger-devtoolsstars39

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Learning

Multiuser DevTools

  • DevTools Remotestars636 - Remotely debug someone else's browser.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
DevTools Extensions

Accessibility (A11y)

  • Chromelens - See how your web app will look to people with different types of vision and the path users will travel when tabbing through your page.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/awesome-chrome-devtools Aug 1st - Aug 7th, 2016
item.description:
Learning

  • Dev Tips - Large collection of tips as animated gifs.

    • Chrome DevTools Protocol

    Browser Adapters

  • ios-webkit-debug-proxystars5.2k - Exposes Mobile Safari & UIWebView instances via the CDP.
    • Remote Debug iOS WebKit adapterstars2.5k - Builts upon ios-webkit-debug-proxy and translates WebKit's Remote Debugging Protocol API to the CDP.

    • DevTools Extensions

    Workflow

  • Clockwork - View PHP application profiling data.
  • Emulated Device Lab - Experiment with multiple devices being emulated at the same time.
  • RailsPanel - View Ruby on Rails application profiling data.
  • React Developer Tools - Inspect the React component hierarchies.
  • EmberJS Inspector - Allows you to inspect EmberJS objects in your application.
  • VueJS Developer Toolsstars20k - Inspect VueJS components and manipulate their data.
  • Angular Batarang - Inspect an Angular application's scope and profile its data.
  • Marionette Inspector - Inspect a Marionette application's views, events, and live data.
  • Backbone Debugger - Inspect a Backbone application's views, models, events, and routes.
  • App Inspector for Sencha - Inspect a Sencha ExtJS/Touch application's component tree, data stores, events, and layouts.
  • Redux Devtools - Inspect Redux with actions history, undo and replay.
  • Three.js - Edit any three.js project.
  • Insightstars872 - A WebGL debugging toolkit which enables more productive WebGL development and more efficient WebGL applications.
  • BEM devtoolsstars43 - Inspect BEM entities expressed in i-bem framework.

    • DevTools Extensions

    Themes

  • DevTools Author - A selection of themes to modify parts of DevTools related to authoring web applications.
  • Zero Dark Matrix - Dark theme for Chrome Developer Tools.
